heading: Disposition of rentals for Government plants
label: 559 Disposition of rentals for Government plants
text: Amounts paid after , by private parties or other agencies for rental of plant owned by the Government in connection with the prosecution of river and harbor works shall be deposited in each case to the credit of the appropriation to which the plant belongs.August 8, 1917
notes: CodificationSection is from act , popularly known as the “Rivers and Harbors Appropriation Act of 1917”.Aug. 8, 1917
